div.h2: Index Maintenance — Write Amplification on INSERT / DELETE
div.p: 1 SQL write → 1 table B-tree write + 1 index B+tree write per index

g.text: DELETE FROM users WHERE rowid = 2 — removes Bob (age=30)
Write cost per INSERT: 1 btree_insert() + 1 index_insert() = 2 B-tree writes
READ FIRST: btree_search(rowid=2) fetches age=30 before any write — index key must be known to remove it
Write cost per DELETE: 1 btree_delete_by_rowid() + 1 index_delete() = 2 B-tree writes
Page split | each insert may cascade — additional I/O per level
Bulk load | DROP indexes → load → re-CREATE: 10–100× faster
